# IBEX Harness

> Self-hosted LLM proxy with persistent agent memory, context assembly, and behavioral drift detection for AI agents at scale.

IBEX Harness is an open-source (MIT) platform for teams running AI agents in production. Marketing lives on ibexharness.com; documentation, blog, releases, and roadmap live on docs.ibexharness.com.

## Canonical domains

| Property | URL |
|----------|-----|
| Marketing (home) | https://ibexharness.com/ |
| Documentation | https://docs.ibexharness.com/ |
| Docs introduction | https://docs.ibexharness.com/docs/getting-started/introduction |
| Architecture | https://docs.ibexharness.com/docs/architecture/overview |
| API reference | https://docs.ibexharness.com/docs/api/overview |
| Blog | https://docs.ibexharness.com/blog |
| Releases / changelog | https://docs.ibexharness.com/releases |
| Roadmap | https://docs.ibexharness.com/roadmap |
| Source (GitHub) | https://github.com/Rick1330/ibex-harness |
| License (MIT) | https://github.com/Rick1330/ibex-harness/blob/main/LICENSE |

## Sitemaps

- Marketing: https://ibexharness.com/sitemap.xml
- Docs (includes blog, releases, roadmap): https://docs.ibexharness.com/sitemap.xml

## AI / crawler files

- Marketing LLM context: https://ibexharness.com/llms.txt
- Docs LLM context: https://docs.ibexharness.com/llms.txt
- Marketing crawler policy: https://ibexharness.com/ai.txt
- Docs crawler policy: https://docs.ibexharness.com/ai.txt

## Product summary

- **What it is:** A Go LLM proxy + auth service that intercepts OpenAI-compatible API calls.
- **Who it's for:** Engineering teams deploying AI agents with multi-tenant isolation requirements.
- **Phase 1 (shipped):** Proxy ingress, auth gRPC validation, per-org Redis rate limiting.
- **Phase 2+ (roadmap):** Memory extraction/retrieval, context assembly per request, drift detection.
- **Stack:** Go (proxy, auth), PostgreSQL, Redis; Python services planned for memory/context.
- **License:** MIT — fully open source.

## Marketing page sections (ibexharness.com)

- #product — capability overview and architecture story
- #how-it-works — request flow (agent → proxy → auth → provider)
- #resources — links to docs, blog, releases, and roadmap on docs.ibexharness.com
- #faq — adoption and scope questions

## Preferred citations

Use the name **IBEX Harness**. Link to https://ibexharness.com/ for product overview or https://docs.ibexharness.com/docs/getting-started/introduction for technical onboarding.
